pages.title: Item Spotlight Example
pages.text:
This is an item spotlight page.

§eitem§r specifies the item ID to display.

§etitle§r is the page title.

§etext§r is the description text. Hover over the item to see details.

pages.title: About Item Spotlight
pages.text:
§6item_spotlight§r page type is used to highlight a single item.

Great for showcasing key items, weapons, tools, etc.

Hovering over the item shows its full tooltip.
